project.name: WordPress 2026
project.description: Fresh full-site WordPress build on the Dell remote for Gutenberg-first planning and implementation. Existing Astro and prior block-theme work are reference-only; content may be extracted as plain-text page inventory, but no source code, templates, theme files, or old block markup should be imported.

wordpress.runtimeConnection: HTTP REST plus project-local Playground CLI scripts
wordpress.database: SQLite via WordPress Playground default integration
safetyLimits: No Docker runtime for this instance.
Do not write credentials into repo files.
Keep Codex plugin state project-local under .wp-gutenberg-designer/.
Use extracted data as plain-text page inventory only.
Do not import source code, Astro code, theme templates, block markup, or old plugin implementation artifacts.
Create or import WordPress pages only after the page inventory is reviewed and approved.

visualSystem.intent: Clean Gutenberg-native foundation; final brand and page system to be planned with wp-gutenberg-designer before implementation.

gates: Do not import Astro source code, templates, theme files, or old block markup.
Do not import redirects into Rank Math until Rank Math is installed and reviewed.

colors.notes: Use provisional tokens until user provides brand direction.

suggested: SEO plugin, caching/performance plugin, backup/export strategy after hosting target is confirmed
forbidden: Docker-only runtime dependencies for this instance

suggested: browser/editor testing after content or theme work begins

runtime: npm run verify returns ok against http://100.70.222.25:8093
WordPress core version is readable from wordpress/wp-includes/version.php
No docker compose file or Dockerfile is required for boot
gutenberg: Prefer core blocks, theme.json, templates, template parts, and patterns before custom blocks
Run editor compatibility checks before publishing generated block markup

performance.seo: Crawlable text, one H1 per page type, image alt intent required
performance.accessibility: Logical headings and no nested interactive controls
performance.target: Keep custom CSS small and token-based until design system is confirmed

contentIntake.method: public WordPress REST API page extraction
boundaries: Use extracted data as plain-text page inventory only.
Do not import source code, Astro code, theme templates, block markup, or old plugin implementation artifacts.
Create or import WordPress pages only after the page inventory is reviewed and approved.

importedDatasets.importedAs: primary parent candidates, related-child candidates, template-family review queues
title, meta description, primary/secondary keywords, phrase headings, schema vocabulary, copy brief fields
templateFamily, page type, schema type, visible vs hidden field rules
voice, palette, card/hero/CTA constraints, Gutenberg Basics adaptation notes

gates: User must classify fields/pages as clean or dirty before implementation.
User must approve each page-type Gutenberg Basics implementation pass.
No WordPress page creation, metadata write, template edit, or surface change without explicit approval.
No Astro, Starwind, CSS, visual asset, theme template, or block markup import.

serviceNavigationPlan.guardrail: Planning artifact only; no WordPress navigation, page-parent, template, or visible surface change until user approves implementation.

sitewideNavigationPlan.breadcrumbsTarget: Gutenberg-native patterns generated from approved relationships
sitewideNavigationPlan.guardrail: Planning artifact only; no WordPress navigation, template, page, or visible surface change until user approves implementation.
